001package edu.cnm.deepdive.pippiphooray.model.dao;
002
003import androidx.lifecycle.LiveData;
004import androidx.room.Dao;
005import androidx.room.Insert;
006import androidx.room.Query;
007import androidx.room.Update;
008import edu.cnm.deepdive.pippiphooray.model.entity.Egg;
009import edu.cnm.deepdive.pippiphooray.model.pojo.BatchEggAggregate;
010import java.util.List;
011
012@Dao
013public interface EggDao {
014
015  @Insert
016  long insert(Egg egg);
017
018  @Insert
019  List<Long> insertAll(List<Egg> eggs);
020
021  @Update
022  void update(Egg egg);
023
024  @Update
025  void update(List<Egg> eggs);
026
027  @Query("SELECT * FROM egg WHERE egg_group_id = :eggGroupId")
028  LiveData<List<Egg>> selectByEggGroup(long eggGroupId);
029
030  @Query("SELECT * FROM egg WHERE egg_group_id = :eggGroupId ORDER BY egg_number ASC")
031  List<Egg> fetchByEggGroup(long eggGroupId);
032
033  @Query("SELECT * FROM egg WHERE egg_id = :eggId")
034  LiveData<Egg> select(long eggId);
035
036  @Query(
037      "SELECT e.egg_group_id AS eggGroupId, " +
038          "       eg.batch_id    AS batchId, " +
039          "       COUNT(*)       AS totalCount, " +
040          "       SUM(CASE WHEN e.hatch_status = 'VIABLE' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS viableCount " +
041          "FROM egg e " +
042          "JOIN egg_group eg ON e.egg_group_id = eg.egg_group_id " +
043          "GROUP BY eg.batch_id"
044  )
045  LiveData<List<BatchEggAggregate>> selectViabilityPerBatch();
046}
